title: [policy] Dispatch byte compliance
description: Policy: spec/02-physical-link.md §4.1. MUST NOT: infer payload namespace from first byte (0x14=SCHC, 0x15=LICHEN routing). MUST: check dispatch byte explicitly before parsing body. When executing: grep for payload parsing in RX path, create compliance bead per code section.
close_reason: Verified compliant: All 9 code paths (C, Rust, Python) explicitly check dispatch byte (0x14 SCHC, 0x15 routing) before payload parsing. No namespace inference from first byte.
